codeReview.summary: The fix commit addresses both prior blocking scrutiny findings: non-employeeController employee mutations now emit scenario-scoped SSE events with appropriate event types/payloads, and AI history forwarding now filters empty/whitespace assistant turns before API submission.

summary: Reviewed fix-collab-ai-scrutiny (commit 350879c). The previously blocking SSE gap is resolved in headcount approval materialization and scheduled-change apply paths (including internal applyDueChangesForScenario), and the blocking AI empty-assistant-history regression is resolved in aiChatStore history construction. No new blocking issues were identified for the targeted failures.
